_doc: UI specification for the crafting menu system. Mobile-first, tablet landscape, touch interactions.

navigation.backToGame: X button or swipe-down from top

tinker-tray.purpose: Mental workbench — select what you're mulling over
tinker-tray.layout: vertical ranked slots (1-5) with available items tray below

concept-board.layout: pannable/zoomable node graph with category color coding
concept-board.detailPanel: slides up from bottom on select — description, ranks, learned-from, unlocks, [Add to Mind]

nodeStates.partial: full color, silver border, partial stars
nodeStates.locked: grey silhouette, lock icon, shows prerequisites

recipe-browser.layout: left panel (scrollable recipe list) + right panel (selected recipe detail)

recipeStates.partial: empty dot — known but missing materials

recipe-browser.detailPanel: inputs → output visual, material counts with have/need, concepts involved, station, time, [CRAFT] or [FORGE VIEW], [Add to Mind]
recipe-browser.entryToForge: tap [FORGE] on detail panel → opens pipeline view

forge-view.purpose: Crafting execution — dependency pipeline, batch crafting, partial progress
forge-view.layout: left-to-right flowchart (raw → refined → component → final), pannable

nodeStates.need-to-craft: yellow dashed border, shows count needed
nodeStates.craftable-here: pulsing highlight — can do right now

modes.craft-all: Auto-queues entire chain, visits stations in order, progress animation
modes.step-by-step: Manual confirmation per step, good for quality challenges
modes.craft-available: Only craft what's possible at current location/station

forge-view.smartCollapse: Already-owned intermediates collapse their sub-trees, only expands branches still needed
forge-view.multiQuantity: Target x N multiplies quantities, same tree structure

pinned-project.purpose: Persistent tracking of a crafting goal across gameplay
pinned-project.packIntegration: relevant materials get project icon, pickup notifications show progress
pinned-project.gatheringHints: When picking up a resource needed for project: '(3/6 iron ore for Iron Sword)'

worldHighlighting._doc: Resources and stations needed for pinned projects are visually highlighted in the game world. The player's goals shape what stands out.

resources.effect: subtle glow/shimmer on world objects that contain needed materials
examples: Iron ore nodes glow faintly when project needs iron
Herb patches shimmer when you need green herbs
Animals you need hides from get a faint outline
resources.intensity: scales with urgency — last few needed glow brighter than early gathering
resources.range: only when reasonably close (not across the map — you still explore)

stations.effect: station buildings pulse/glow when you can advance your project there
stations.smoke: smithy chimney smokes a slightly different color when it's relevant to you
stations.proximity: notification when entering station range: 'You could work on your Iron Sword here'

npcs.effect: NPCs who teach needed recipes get a subtle indicator (speech bubble icon?)
npcs.dialogue: extra line available: 'I notice you've been working on something — need help with that blade?'

dungeonLoot.effect: loot drops relevant to pinned projects get highlighted in loot screens
dungeonLoot.priority: doesn't change drop tables — just makes relevant drops visually obvious

loreFragments.effect: inspectable objects related to pinned Mind tray items get a faint aura
loreFragments.stacks: if both a crafting project AND tinker tray are relevant, stronger highlight

settings.toggleable: player can turn off highlighting if they want a purer exploration experience
settings.subtlety: never a giant arrow or quest marker — just a gentle 'your eyes are drawn to it' glow

inventory.layout: grid of item icons with counts, sub-tabs for categories

subTabs.shows: raw, refined, components — grid with counts
weapons, armor, accessories — list or paper-doll (later)
collected fragments, scrolls, observations — list with short text

inventory.projectHighlight: items needed for pinned projects get a small anvil badge

crossScreenFeatures.addToMind: Available on every item/concept/recipe detail panel — one tap to send to Tinker Tray
crossScreenFeatures.jumpToRecipe: From concept detail, tap an 'unlocks' item to jump to recipe browser filtered to it
crossScreenFeatures.jumpToConcept: From recipe detail, tap a concept tag to jump to concept board focused on it
crossScreenFeatures.detailPanel: Consistent bottom-slide-up panel across all screens for selected item info

visualStyle.theme: craftsman's workshop — leather, wood, stitched patches, iron fittings
visualStyle.patches: scout-badge style — embroidered circles with symbolic icons, color-coded by category
visualStyle.connections: thread/string between patches — taut = strong connection, frayed = weak
visualStyle.highlights: warm glow for actionable items, cool pulse for station-proximity
visualStyle.typography: pixel-friendly, clear at small sizes, no serif

implementation.framework: rexUI (Phaser 3 plugin) — same ecosystem as virtual joystick
implementation.graphRendering: Custom Phaser GameObjects for concept board nodes + lines (not rexUI — needs pan/zoom)
implementation.transitions: Phaser tweens for panel slides, tab switches, node highlights
